evals.prompt: Run the platform audit for Deutsche Telekom SOC-T. We want to demo ML anomaly detection, ES|QL threat hunting, AI Assistant, and ELSER semantic search over threat intel.
evals.expected_output: platform-audit.json with feature matrix (ML ready, ES|QL ready, ELSER setup-required, AI Assistant unverified-connector), platform-audit.md with amber status and ordered pre-demo task list
assertions: overall_status is amber (ELSER needs setup, AI Assistant connector unverified)
ML anomaly detection marked ready (4 dedicated ML nodes, 131 active jobs confirmed)
ELSER marked setup_required with half-day effort
Agent Builder or Workflows marked upgrade_required if included in scope
Pre-demo task list is ordered (ELSER setup before scenes that depend on it)
Bottom line paragraph correctly identifies critical path

evals.prompt: Audit the Citizens Bank demo scope against their platform. No diagnostic available — just the discovery notes output.
evals.expected_output: platform-audit.json in partial mode with unverified statuses, platform-audit.md clearly flagging that diagnostic is needed before build
assertions: All ML/semantic features marked unverified (no diagnostic to confirm)
Pre-demo tasks include: run warp-scan to confirm platform
overall_status is amber or red due to unverified requirements
Bottom line recommends getting diagnostic before scoping build

evals.prompt: The Lowe's demo is already built on Serverless 9.3. Run a platform audit to confirm everything used in the script is available.
evals.expected_output: platform-audit.json with green status, all features ready, platform-audit.md confirming scope as viable
assertions: ML anomaly detection marked ready (serverless auto-scales ML)
pre_demo_tasks list is short (quick setup items only)
